form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr6) over 2180m at Wagin, beaten 22 m by Majic Bay (2:44.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 70 on April 2 at $126. Before that 5th (Sr1) over 2180m at Wagin beaten 23 m by Skip A Beat (2:47.50) in 4yo+ NR up to 69 on March 27 at $19. Not a genuine contender.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Beatitlikebeca at Pinjarra over 1177m in a NR up to 55 on March 30 at $19. Then a handy effort when a close second behind You Fly With Me at Pinjarra over 1177m in a 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $4.80. Strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (FT Fr5) over 2503m at Gloucester Park beaten 21 m by Petes Honour (3:07.20) in NR 60 or better on March 20 at $91. Two runs back 4th (Fr6) over 2185m at Pinjarra beaten 1.2 m by Leaveamessage (2:40.20) in 4yo+ NR 55 to 64 on March 9 at $34. Better off avoiding.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced in the back straight on the final occasion.
Failing to be fully in position by the Candy Pole marker.
Reared as the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr5) over 2185m at Pinjarra, beaten 35 m by Soho Shakedown (2:36.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 80 on April 6 at $126. At the run before was well back in the run when 8th (Fr4) over 1684m at Pinjarra, beaten 13 m by Longreach Bay (1:58.00) in 4yo+ NR 77 to 85 on March 30 at $23. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Last start by a head (Sr3) at Pinjarra (2:38.30) beating Our Rich Cargo in 4yo+ No NR M on April 6 at $5. In the right form and can score again.

form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when second at Wagin on April 2. Proved too good the start before at Bunbury on March 28. Rates highly. Big chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Beaten favourite last start when second at Wagin on April 2. Proved too good the start before at Bunbury on March 28. Rates highly. Big chance.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into twelfth after being driven well back, behind Tiger Royal at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 4yo+ 1-3W/17 0K stake on March 27 at $91. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3 m finishing second behind Majic Bay at Wagin over 2180m in a 4yo+ NR up to 70 on April 2 at $2.15. This race appears well within his grasp.
